messages.content: 优化专业一点 “8 instruments still under issue troubleshotting"
"Troubleshooting remains for 8 instruments yet to be resolved within the optimization field."
优化简单一点 “8 instruments still under issue troubleshotting"
"We're still working on fixing 8 instruments in the optimization area."
优化简单一点 “8 instruments still under low sensitivity issue troubleshooting"
"We're still trying to address sensitivity issues with 8 instruments in the optimization area."
优化完美一点 “8 instruments still under low sensitivity issue troubleshooting"
"We are diligently troubleshooting the low sensitivity issues with 8 instruments in the optimization area to ensure optimal performance."
优化狡猾一点 “8 instruments still under low sensitivity issue troubleshooting"
"Despite our best efforts, 8 instruments in the optimization area are proving to be quite elusive in terms of low sensitivity issue troubleshooting."
优化专业一点 “8 instruments still under low sensitivity issue troubleshooting"

"We are engaged in ongoing efforts to resolve low sensitivity issues with 8 instruments related to optimization, employing thorough troubleshooting protocols and advanced methodologies to achieve high-performance outcomes."
优化专业一点 "for instrument A, the result is failing borderline"
"Our assessment of instrument A indicates a borderline-failing result. Further evaluation and optimization may be necessary to achieve optimal performance."
优化专业一点 “We will continue to fix the remaining 6 units."
"We are committed to addressing the outstanding issues with the remaining 6 units, and will continue to work diligently until we achieve optimal performance."
优化简单一点 “We will continue to fix the remaining 6 units."
"We'll keep working on the other 6 units to make sure they're all fixed."
